data.title: Federal Appeal Argues Second Amendment Violated After NYPD Admits Gun Licensing Regime Has No Deadline
data.description: Today, on April 3, 2026, civil rights lawyer Susan Chana Lask lodged a federal appeal in the Second Circuit representing plaintiffs who contest the NYPD's noncompliance with statutory deadlines related to firearm license applications. The plaintiffs claim that this failure violates certain regulations.

data.title: Chula Vista Student Pursues Dental Career with Scholarship at UEI College
data.description: Isabella Troncoso Medrano, a resident of Chula Vista, California, has aspired to become a dentist from a young age. Her passion for dentistry stemmed from her experiences at her aunt's dental clinic in Mexico, where she spent time in her childhood. This interest developed as she observed her mother working.

data.title: Bicara Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grant under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Bicara Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: BCAX) in Boston granted an award to a new employee as part of the 2026 Inducement Plan. The company, focused on developing therapies for solid tumors, provided this inducement grant to attract the employee to join.

data.title: DEUS EX MACHINA Expands Ingredient Upscaling Platform Through Pilot Collaborations and Beta Program, Targets Q3 2026 Launch
data.description: DEUS EX MACHINA, a bioinformatics company from Athens, Greece, is making significant progress towards its official market release, with the help of select partners who have joined in early testing and co-development activities. The advanced AI-powered platform combines expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Analytics. Set for release on April 3, 2026, this promising technology is positioned to revolutionize the industry.
